title: Old Cesura
description: Official pack for the Cesura League Server – your Cobblemon adventure starts here!
body:
> ⚙️ **This is the official modpack for the Cesura League Cobblemon Server.**  
> Join the adventure at the server IP below and experience Cesura as it's meant to be played!

# 🎮 Welcome to the **Cesura League**  
A realm of wild Cobblemon, epic challenges, and unforgettable journeys.

---

## 🌐 Server Address  
### ▶️ **MC.PLAYCESURA.COM**  
Alternatives: `playcesura.com` or `193.135.10.6:15711`

📌 Add this to your Minecraft Multiplayer to get started.

[![Join us on Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Join%20us%20on%20Discord-5865F2?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=white)](https://discord.gg/6n5mJppvtU)

---

## ✨ What Makes Cesura Special?

🗺️ **Explore a Handcrafted World**  
The Tinova region was originally created by **BzUrQ**, shared by **Z4the**, and carefully adapted for server play by **Enryu** (that’s me!).  
From lush valleys to hidden ruins — Tinova is packed with biomes, secrets, and scenic paths to explore.

🚫 **No Building. Just Adventure.**  
This isn't a sandbox server. There's no land claiming or base grinding — it's all about the **journey**, the **battles**, and the **exploration**.

🧑‍🎤 **Real Players, Real Rivals**  
Gym Leaders are real people. So is the Champion.  
If you want the throne, you'll have to **earn it** — and hold it.

🎖️ **Gym Leader & Elite Four Spots Are Still Open!**  
Think you’ve got what it takes to represent a type or defend your title as part of the Elite Four?  
**Apply via our Discord** and claim your place in Cesura history.

🛒 **NPC Shops Loaded with Goodies**  
From useful tools to rare and **premium items** like **Mints**, **Ability Patches**, and more — our shops have **everything** you need to perfect your team.  
🪙 *But fair warning:* These items **won’t come cheap** — true power takes effort.  
Still, with dedication, **every Pokémon can be perfected**.

✨ **Starter Pokémon with Max IVs**  
Everyone begins their journey with a perfectly optimized partner — because you deserve a strong start! 💪

🌟 **Naturally Spawning Legendaries**  
No artificial spawns or commands — just pure, thrilling encounters out in the wild.

⛓️ **Pokémon Chaining System**  
Boost your odds and build streaks to chase down those elusive shinies or perfect stats.

🔓 **Fair Play Only**  
No loot crates. No CS:2-style key systems.  
**No Pay2Win.** Just you, your team, and your choices.  
You can't pay for anything actually.

---

## 🏆 Ready to Become a Legend?

Whether you're a veteran trainer or brand new to Cobblemon —  
**The Cesura League welcomes all who dare to dream big.**  
Your legacy starts here.
